text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking around campus...

text_block_list.name: Rat?
text_block_list.text: Squeaky, squeak! Bakushin, Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Cat?
text_block_list.text: Meow, meow! Bakushin, Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid not!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It is I, your class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, no! I blew my cover!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm playing pretend! You see, I don't want my
research subjects to find me—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait?! Where did my subjects go?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Let's go find them, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what is going on, but it doesn't feel
right to leave her alone either. So, I decide to tag
along...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The tracks don't look so good today...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That's because of yesterday's rain. But these are
the perfect conditions for muddy track training.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But then... my misfortune might cause something
bad to happen...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Taking appropriate measures in the event of an
irregular occurrence is also a part of training. Do
you not recall this?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon... You're right. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's no matter. More so, there is something that
has caught my interest—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, this mud is heavy... to think I would become
trapped! You're quite the opponent, ol' muddy
track!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's so difficult to catch what they're saying.
Especially Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Conditions... irregu...lar? Part of... pla... platter of
tuna?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
They plan to eat sushi after training?! Hm, I must
also attend for my research then!
choice_data_list: Are those two your research subjects?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ohoh! How did you know?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am conducting research on those two, my
supposed future rivals...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It is quite a large project, so I had all intentions
to keep it a secret from you as precaution.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yet it appears you are quite the mind reader,
Trainer! You're some kind of cryptid, aren't you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I more or less understand why Sakura Bakushin O
is keeping watch of the two Umamusume, but I
feel I should still ask her directly...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good question, I will answer you as class
representative. Those two are the latest hopefuls
for the Classics next year!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Which means I will surely face them if I'm to
follow the Bakushin Road!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower. She's on the small side, but she's a
stayer with real talent. She may seem wimpy, but
deep down she has the guts to win.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon. She has enough speed to run as
a sprinter, and her stamina lets her take
advantage of her speed. That makes her a
formidable contender.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Both of them are hard to handle, but Bourbon will
likely be the harder fight.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Her speed cannot be taken lightly. I'll have to
battle for the lead right from the start...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...Um, hey, are you listening?! Don't space out
now!
choice_data_list: That was quite the excellent analysis.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O usually just plows headfirst
into things, but here she is making astute
observations.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Of course! I am class representative after all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Analyzing my rivals is but a piece of cake... No, it
is merely a crumb of my powers!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I get the research bit down, then any medium
race will become a cinch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't quite grasped the most important
factor here, but I hold back on saying anything.
That's when...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wh-wha—?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have observed that you, Bakushin O, have been
tracking us since morning.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I have reasoned that you must have
something you wish to discuss with us. So I shall
ask you—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Before you do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I most certainly have not been researching you
two! No way, nuh-uh!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? R-research?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That's right! Go now, practice in peace!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Squeak!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wait, Bakushin O! If you run off like that, then—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Slip.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! Wha—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Oh no! Bakushin O looked back because I called
out to her, and now she's covered in mud!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While helping her up, I think over how best to
deal with Sakura Bakushin O's fervent dedication
toward the Bakushin Road...
